name: m100-bootstrap
description: M100 Bootstrap Installer - Platform-aware installation of M100 development tools

scripts.presetup: echo 'M100 Setup: Checking prerequisites...' && command -v wget >/dev/null || { echo 'Error: wget required'; exit 1; } && echo '✓ Ready to install'
scripts.postsetup: echo 'M100 Setup: Verifying installation...' && [ -x ~/.m100/tools/bin/m100-scan ] && echo '✓ Installation complete' || { echo 'Error: Installation failed'; exit 1; }

author: M100 Platform Team
